ABOUT HOROF
A BRAND IN MOTION

HOROF isn't a master plan. It's a feeling put into fabric — the beauty of Arabic calligraphy, the energy of street culture, the quiet confidence of knowing who you are.

Every piece carries the spirit of حروف — letters that form words, words that form identity. It's not nostalgia, it's not futuristic, it's just... now.

"Letters build words. Words build identity."
